label: Breadcrumbs
summary: The "You are here:" trail as an ordered list of links.
era: "You are here:", the directory-portal trail printed above every category page, mall-map style.

classes.name: rs-breadcrumbs
classes.role: the trail; bold prefix and > separators come from the CSS

a11y: <nav aria-label="You are here"> around an <ol>; the current page gets aria-current="page". Separators are CSS, invisible to readers.
